name: Balsamic Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar, combine the mustard, vinegar, water, lemon juice, tarragon and garlic. Shake well to combine.
2. Add oils and shake again.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Store in an airtight container. Use within 6 months for best flavor.
Makes about ¾ cup (12 servings of 1 tablespoon each).
